candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears directly under the selected parent/header row 'Production Costs', so it looks like a component already contained within the selected COGS bucket.
Explicit COGS-related amortisation row, but it sits as a sub-line under 'Production Costs', which is already in the selected COGS bucket.
Generic operating depreciation line, but it is not clearly COGS-specific and could overlap broader operating buckets; conservative treatment is not to add it separately to COGS.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is the combination of 'Purchase of goods and services' and 'Production Costs'. 'Depreciation in COR/COGS' and 'Amortisation in COR/COGS' appear as child/component rows beneath the selected parent/header 'Production Costs', so adding them separately would likely double count.

candidates.why: SG&A-related D&A row, but it appears nested under the sales expense section and therefore looks embedded within the selected SG&A bucket rather than separate from it.
Marketing D&A appears to be a component of marketing costs within SG&A, so it should not be added separately relative to the selected SG&A bucket.
Administration D&A appears to be a sub-component of administrative expenses within SG&A, already covered by the selected SG&A bucket.
Administration amortisation appears as a child row within the admin section, suggesting it is already included in SG&A.
R&D-specific D&A exists, but 'Product Development Costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding this separately would risk distorting the intended XSGA minus XRD treatment.
R&D amortisation appears under the Product Development section; because 'Product Development Costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, this should not be added separately.
Generic amortization line could be a broader summary, but its scope is unclear and it is not clearly a separate add-on outside the selected SG&A bucket; conservative choice is to avoid adding it.
Generic depreciation line likely spans broader operating expenses and is not clearly a separate SG&A-only add-back outside selected parent rows.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket already includes the parent/aggregate SG&A structure via 'Selling, General & Admin' plus operating overhead rows, and also includes 'Product Development Costs'. The visible D&A rows for sales, marketing, administration, and R&D appear to be nested sub-components of those selected buckets. In addition, R&D is already handled symmetrically through both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD using 'Product Development Costs', so R&D D&A should not be added separately.
